reviews.comment:
UNA VERGUENZA ESTA ESTACIÓN DE SERVICIO QUE TENGA UN BAÑO CERRADO,EL DIA SABADO 12 de diciembre 2020   CERCA DE LAS 13 CARGO COMBUSTIBLE Y PIDO PASAR AL BAÑO Y LOS EMPLEADOS ME DIJERON QUE ESTA CERRADO,SOLO EL BAR PARA CLIENTES TENIA BAÑO. UNA VERGUENZA,NUNCA MAS EN MI VIDA PARO A CARGAR COMBUSTIBLE.

(Translated by Google)
This gas station is a disgrace for having a closed restroom. On Saturday, December 12, 2020, around 1 PM, I filled up with gas and asked to use the restroom, but the employees told me it was closed. Only the customer bar had a restroom. It's a disgrace. I will never stop to fill up again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTMHREMFdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Malísima la atención de los playeros. Domingo 06/12 19:45 hs (para que tomen nota quienes estaban)
Desatentos, charlando y no prestan atención a lo que uno le pide. Mala gestión. Por favor revisar esto, ya que deja mucho que desear.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants was terrible. Sunday, December 6th, 7:45 PM (for those who were there, please take note). They were inattentive, chatting away, and didn't pay attention to what you asked for. Poor management. Please look into this, as it leaves much to be desired.
